sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107625" key="u(perkatage/lastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερκατα-γέλαστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107625.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exceedingly absurd,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:192" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.192</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
